allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { $_MainWindowTitle -like ''*COM4*'' -or $_Name -like ''*serial*'' -or $_Name -like ''*putty*'' -or $_Name -like ''*teraterm*'' -or $_Name -like ''*minicom*'' } | Select-Object Name, Id, MainWindowTitle")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { $_Name -match ''putty|teraterm|cutecom|serial|miniterm|platformio|python|stlink'' } | Select-Object Name, Id | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match ""putty|teraterm|python|platformio|stlink|serial"" } | Select-Object Name, Id | Format-Table -AutoSize')
